news.title: Samsung saw a record quarter, but it's not enough for investors. Here's why.
news.summary: Despite a record quarter, Samsung's (005930.KS) preliminary earnings results are causing volatility in the memory sector, just ahead of SK Hynix's (000660.KS) Friday IPO. Yahoo Finance Senior Business Reporter Ines Ferré takes a closer look in the video above.

news.title: Dow Jones Futures: Nasdaq Slumps As Samsung Fans AI Fears, Oil Prices Jump On Iran News
news.summary: The Nasdaq led the stock market lower Tuesday, as Samsung earnings slammed AI names. Oil prices jumped on U.S.-Iran news.

news.title: Stock Market Today: Nasdaq Is Day's Biggest Loser; Sandisk, Micron Tumble, Eli Lilly Shines
news.summary: Stock Market Today: The Nasdaq falls. IBM stock is a big Dow Jones index winner. Micron and Lam Research sell-off.

news.title: Chips stocks plunge despite strong report from Samsung
news.summary: Chip stocks were hammered again Tuesday, despite some reassuring news from a major player, extending their recent slide into a second week.

news.title: The Market’s Hottest Stock Is Turning Cold
news.summary: Sandisk  has been one of the hottest U.S. tech stocks over the past year but it’s starting to cool off.  Shares of the memory storage company were down around 10% in Tuesday trading, among the sharpest fallers in the  The stock, up 635% this year, has fallen 23% over the past three trading days through Monday.

news.title: Nvidia Shines While SOX Falls
news.summary: The PHLX Semiconductor Index is down 4.3% with all components in the red–with one big exception.  Nvidia is up roughly 1%.  The index gained more than 87% in that timeframe, compared with Nvidia’s nearly 15% gain, according to Dow Jones Market Data.

news.title: The Best Memory Stock to Buy in July Isn't Micron or Sandisk. It Is This Trillion-Dollar Giant
news.summary: Shares of SK Hynix will start trading on the U.S. stock market this week, and its phenomenal growth and valuation make it a no-brainer buy.
